introSection: Typhoon is a steel roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. It opened on 10 April 2004 and is located where the Looping Star once stood.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster was assembled at Gerstlauer's facility in October 2003 as a prototype for testing prior to its shipment to Bobbejaanland. This was only possible because the roller coaster did not have a permanent foundation.

Typhoon opened on 10 April 2004.

In 2019, Typhoon was given a repaint.

fullText:
Typhoon is a steel roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. It opened on 10 April 2004 and is located where the Looping Star once stood.

The roller coaster was assembled at Gerstlauer's facility in October 2003 as a prototype for testing prior to its shipment to Bobbejaanland. This was only possible because the roller coaster did not have a permanent foundation.

Typhoon opened on 10 April 2004.

In 2019, Typhoon was given a repaint.
